conservative.name: Divine Prowess
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. Must have a Melee Attack or Ranged Attack action available (i.e. not recharging)

success.description: You pray to Myrmidia in her aspect as the commander and inspire your allies. You may select a Melee Attack or Ranged Attack action and donate it to an ally within long range. That ally may use that action once (provided he meets its requirements), and when it recharges it returns to you
As above, and your ally may ignore skill training or characteristic-based requirements

boon.description: An ally within long range gains to his next action
An ally within long range recovers 1 stress or 1 fatigue

bane.description: Move the party tension meter 1 space to the right, you bossy git

sigmarsComet.description: Target ally may perform an action immediately after this blessing is invoked

reckless.name: Divine Prowess
reckless.requirements: 6 favour. An ally within long range must have a Melee Attack or Ranged Attack action available (i.e. not recharging)

success.description: You pray to Myrmidia in her aspect as the commander and receive a boon from your allies. One of your allies within long range may donate a Melee Attack or Ranged Attack action to you. You may use that action once (provided you meet its requirements) then return it to its owner when it finishes recharging
As above, but you may ignore any skill training or characteristic-based requirements

sigmarsComet.description: When you use the donated action, your governing attribute for the action is considered to be 1 higher
